---
title: "GoinGlobal"
page-layout: article
---

# GoinGlobal

## Description

Career and employment information platform with country guides, job search resources, visa information, salary data, and workplace advice. Supports global career and labor market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Workforce & Career Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Workforce & Career Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=http://online.goinglobal.com/default.aspx)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
